command:
python3 -c "import socket, json, time

# Quick TCP check that NATS port is open
s = socket.socket()
s.settimeout(3)
try:
    s.connect(("localhost", 4222))
    banner = s.recv(1024).decode()
    s.close()
    print("NATS_BANNER:", banner[:80].strip())
except Exception as e:
    print("TCP_FAIL:", e)

# Check monitoring endpoint
import urllib.request
try:
    r = urllib.request.urlopen("http://localhost:8222/varz", timeout=3)
    d = json.loads(r.read())
    print("SERVER:", d["server_name"], "VER:", d["version"], "JS:", d.get("jetstream", {}).get("enabled", False))
except Exception as e:
    print("VARZ_FAIL:", e)" 2>&1
